failure_modes.text: A communicator can accelerate acceptance of a weak answer, turning better packaging into worse downstream decisions.
failure_modes.source_quote: brilliant communication of the wrong answer is even more harmful
failure_modes.mitigation: Separate packaging from substance: after any persuasive communication, require the audience to restate the core evidence and logic without the framing — if the case collapses, the persuasion was compensating for weakness.

failure_modes.text: Motivated reasoning can turn persuasion into self-serving message design that seeks assent instead of truth.
failure_modes.mitigation: Appoint a 'message-truth auditor' who checks whether the persuasive frame accurately represents the underlying data, trade-offs, and uncertainties.

failure_modes.text: Complexity overload can muddy an otherwise easy yes by forcing the audience to process more detail than they can carry.
failure_modes.source_quote: muddy up an otherwise easy yes
failure_modes.mitigation: Simplify the message to the decision-relevant core: strip detail until the audience can hold the entire argument in working memory, then stop.

premortem_questions.text: What do I want the audience to think, feel, and do?
Are we selling the solution, or are we still telling the story of the search?
If the substance were weaker than we think, what part of this packaging would most likely hide that weakness from the audience?
premortem_questions.source_quote: persuasive technique is used to accelerate acceptance of a weak answer

heuristics.text: Use pre-suasion and salience cues to prepare attention before delivering the core ask.
Package the message so it is simple, concrete, credible, emotional, and story-carried enough to survive overload.
Match the appeal to how the audience is actually processing the decision instead of defaulting to the communicator's preferred style.

curation_notes.summary: Kept the intervention layer on packaging discipline, think-feel-do targeting, and anti-bad-answer safeguards.
donor_drops: Did not preserve broad marketing tactic sprawl because the raw source is strongest on message fit, overload reduction, and ethical caution.
open_questions: The third premortem question is reviewed compression over several raw warnings about persuasive overreach.

allies: The source is rich on narratives, empathy, cognitive-load reduction, and structured messaging.
antagonists: The raw antagonists clearly point toward critical-thinking, first-principles-thinking, and curse-of-knowledge pressure.
structured_tensions: No explicit structured tension block was preserved from the raw file.
